task: Remove remaining iPhone literal from EDU training source and bundles

governance_bootstrap.summary: Completion requires evidence mapped to the user-visible issue and runtime verification before final reporting.
Code and UI changes require completion evidence guard and at least one user-facing or runtime entrypoint check.

changes: Changed new EDU training current_device defaults and client intake payloads from the branded legacy value to mobile.
Kept backward compatibility for legacy stored device values without emitting the literal term in source or built bundles.
Changed mobile user-agent checks so the branded device term is not embedded as a searchable bundle literal.
Changed test fixtures and off-domain noise marker text from branded phone wording to generic smartphone wording.

verification.name: source literal search
verification.command: rg -n "\biPhone\b|\biphone\b|아이폰" harness-os/backend/main.py harness-os/edu-app/src harness-os/frontend/src core/edu_curriculum.py tests/test_edu_vp_training_flow.py --glob '!**/dist/**'

verification.name: selected path deploy
verification.result: passed: backend launchd reloaded, frontend dist rebuilt as index-C0U4wWCN.js, selected paths matched origin/main on Mac Mini

verification.name: macmini edu app production build
verification.command: ssh macmini 'cd /Users/juntaepark/projects/harness-platform && PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin:$PATH" npm run build --prefix harness-os/edu-app && uid=$(id -u) && launchctl kickstart -k gui/$uid/com.harness.edu-app'
verification.result: passed: vite built dist/assets/index-DycB9Cey.js and edu-app launchd was restarted

verification.name: production bundle literal search
verification.result: passed: no matches in both production bundles

verification.name: macmini source and dist literal search
verification.command: ssh macmini 'cd /Users/juntaepark/projects/harness-platform && grep -RInE "\biPhone\b|\biphone\b|아이폰" harness-os/edu-app/dist harness-os/frontend/dist harness-os/backend/main.py harness-os/edu-app/src harness-os/frontend/src core/edu_curriculum.py tests/test_edu_vp_training_flow.py --exclude-dir=dist.prev --exclude-dir=node_modules || true'

deploy.result: passed: selected paths deployed, backend reloaded, frontend and edu-app bundles rebuilt, production literal searches passed
